task1.title: A school library 5 years ago and the same library now
task1.instruction: The plans show a school library 5 years ago and the same library now. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: Nowadays, sports is a big business with high earnings for professional sports people and companies involved both financially and other ways. Is this a positive or negative development for sports?
